Type Property# keyboardDidHide

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+

```
static var keyboardDidHide: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIResponder.KeyboardDidHideMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIResponder.KeyboardDidHideMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/keyboarddidhide#see-also)
